title: To direct the Joint Committee on the Library to procure a statue of Benjamin Franklin for placement in the Capitol.
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration.
crs_summary: This bill requires the Joint Committee on the Library to contract for and place a statue of Benjamin Franklin in the Capitol. The committee shall place the statue in a permanent public location where it is accessible during a guided tour provided by the Capitol Visitor Center. The contract must be executed by December 31, 2025, and the statue must be placed by December 31, 2026.
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration.
